description: Update the specified Prime Change Order Batch.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the Prime Change Order Batch

parameters.name: run_configurable_validations
parameters.description: If true, validations are run for the corresponding Configurable Field Set.

description.description: Description of the Prime Change Order Batch

executed.description: Whether or not the Prime Change Order Batch is executed

private.description: Only show this Contract to Admins and specific Accessors

signature_required.description: Whether or not a signature is required on the Prime Change Order

status.description: The status of the Prime Change Order

created_by.description: User that created the Prime Change Order Batcb

data_type.description: Data type of the Custom Field Definition

value.description: The value of the custom field

data_type.description: Data type of the Custom Field Definition

value.description: The value of the custom field

data_type.description: Data type of the Custom Field Definition

value.description: The value of the custom field

data_type.description: Data type of the Custom Field Definition
Data type of the Custom Field Definition

base_currency_iso_code.description: Base Currency ISO Code configured from project level; It'll be populated only when multicurrency phase two feature flag is enabled

currency_iso_code.description: Currency ISO Code configured for the financial entity

executed.description: Whether or not the Change Order Batch is executed

number.description: Number of the Change Order Batch

private.description: Whether or not the Change Order Batch is private

signature_required.description: Whether a signature will be required for this Change Order Batch

signed_change_order_received_date.description: Signed Change Order Batch Received Date

title.description: Title of the Change Order Batch

designated_reviewer_id.description: Unique identifier for the designated reviewer. This field is only supported for single-tier projects. Behavior is undefined in multi-tier projects.

change_order_ids.description: Array of Change Order (PCO) IDs to link to this batch. This field is only supported for two-tier projects.

legacy_request_ids.description: Array of Change Order Request IDs to link to this batch. This field is only supported for three-tier projects.

custom_field_%{custom_field_definition_i.description:
Value of the custom field. The data type of the value passed in corresponds with the data_type of the Custom Field Definition.
For a lov_entry data_type the value passed in should be the ID of one ...

change_event_attachment_ids.description: List of attachment IDs to attach. These must presently be associated with Change Events.

attachment_ids.description: Existing attachments to preserve on the response

drawing_revision_ids.description: Drawing Revisions to attach to the response

file_version_ids.description: File Versions to attach to the response

form_ids.description: Forms to attach to the response

image_ids.description: Images to attach to the response

upload_ids.description: Uploads to attach to the response
